reasoning: Nov 16: Wikipedia's FIDE rankings page updates monthly (around the 1st), reflecting FIDE's official schedule. Both Nov 9 and Nov 16 should therefore display the exact same ranking (the November 2025 list), so her rank will perfectly match, counting as 'as high or higher' with near certainty. Dec 9: The December 2025 list will be active. Inactive or semi-active players in the top 10 usually maintain their rank unless bumped by a fast-rising competitor. The short timeframe yields a slightly higher-than-even chance she retains or improves her rank. Feb 7: Reflecting the February 2026 list, a 3-month horizon introduces more variance from potential tournament results across the top 20, bringing the odds closest to 50/50.
